description: Using the specialty coffee keyword dataset in coffee_keywords.xlsx, calculate estimated organic traffic and equivalent media value for each keyword based on search volumes, keyword difficulty (KD), and cost-per-click (CPC). Filter for 'low-hanging fruit' (high value, low competition) and create a summary sheet named 'Top_Opportunities' containing the top 20 opportunities sorted by value. Save the final workbook to /home/ga/Documents/coffee_analysis.xlsx.

metadata.expected_top_keyword: organic fair trade coffee beans bulk
